location: Purchasable from the Twin Maiden Husks merchants at Roundtable Hold for 600 Runes, available as soon as you first reach the Hold. Also the default starting weapon for the Prophet class, and a rare drop from Godrick Foot Soldiers.
tactics: Straightforward Rune purchase at Roundtable Hold — no fight required, and it's available to any class from the very start of the game
Prophet characters already start with it in their inventory and don't need to buy it
Godrick Foot Soldiers (regular spear troops around Limgrave and Stormveil Castle) can also drop it, but the merchant purchase is far more reliable
Its light weight (4.0) and Impaling Thrust skill make it a good low-commitment weapon for testing the spear moveset before investing in a heavier one
lore: About as plain and unremarkable a spear as exists — easy to handle for a beginner, with a strong attack that chains several quick stabs together.

builds.name: Beginner quality poke
builds.why: Low even D/D Strength-Dexterity requirements (10/10) and light weight make it an accessible early weapon for any melee build
